metadata.notes: Every alias verified n>0 against real headlines before applying. Dropped for 0 corpus hits: Helms-Burton, Title III, Torricelli, designation, Restricted List, SDN, Gaviota, CIMEX, Habanos, remittance, Western Union, state sponsor, terrorism list, lista negra, licencia, decreto, remesa, patrocinador, Handelsembargo, Enteignung, sanzioni. Dropped 'claim' (generic; 'Trump claims talks under way'). de 'Blockade' kept alongside en 'blockade' deliberately -- the non-EN substring path catches German compounds (Oelblockade) that the EN word-START path cannot.

bundle.term: third parties withdrawing under sanctions threat
